channel.title: LDN/ai — London AI Ecosystem Updates
channel.description: Updates from LDN/ai: new companies, funding rounds, sector analyses, and ecosystem intelligence for London's AI landscape.

item.title: Insights Panel: 7 Vertical Sector Analyses
item.description: New Insights tab with AI-assisted sector analyses covering Health/Biotech, Defence/Gov, AI Safety, DevTools/Infrastructure, Autonomous/Robotics, Fintech, and Generative Media. Each sector includes: The Problem, Who's Solving It, What's Working, Unspoken Truths, Last Mile Gaps, and Adjacent Bets. Ask Deeper AI feature for follow-up questions.

item.title: 10 New Companies Added: Hologen, Causaly, Mindgard, and More
item.description: Added 10 companies from London AI coverage: Hologen ($150M, Eric Schmidt, medical AI), Baseimmune ($11M, AI vaccines), Causaly ($93M, biomedical knowledge graphs), Fractile (AI chips), Mindgard ($12M, AI red teaming), Limbic (NHS mental health), Lindus Health ($55M, clinical trials), Anima Health, AUAR (construction robots), Testudo (AI insurance). Total: 99 companies.

item.title: Sourcing API Beta Launch
item.description: Beta launch of deal intelligence API for VCs: company matching, hiring signals, GitHub activity monitoring, Companies House filings, co-investment overlap analysis, and graph path discovery. Key-gated access.

item.title: People Database: 67 Verified Profiles
item.description: Expanded people database to 67 verified profiles including founders, C-suite, and VC partners/principals from MMC, Seedcamp, LocalGlobe, Atomico, Accel, Index, GV, Balderton, and EF. All verified against official team pages, LinkedIn, and Bloomberg.

item.title: Funding Rounds: 100 Rounds, $37.2B Tracked
item.description: Comprehensive funding database: 100 rounds across London AI companies totalling $37.2B+ in tracked capital. Includes numeric USD amounts, lead/other investors, series, dates, and valuations. API endpoint available.
